title: A new Resource & Equipment Management Solution
excerpt:

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Imagine: you’re halfway through scheduling a machine for a job… then realise it’s out for servicing!!!

Introducing new Resource & Equipment Management Solution ! Built on monday.com Work Management, centralising everything your operations team needs—from job tracking and personnel scheduling to equipment allocation and real-time forecasting. No more juggling spreadsheets, overbooked staff, and scattered equipment planning.

Solution includes:

  • Live job tracking and project progress
  • Real-time staff scheduling and leave syncing
  • Equipment bookings that actually update availability
  • Automatic maintenance logs
  • Cost and effort forecasting (no more back-of-the-envelope maths)

It’s like going from a glorified spreadsheet to a central command centre.
Boom. Clarity. Control. Growth.

Watch the demo here.

Elena
Founder of Kick Consulting

Link to our calendar.

posts.author: SpecialProjects (Shelbey Savoie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Elena,

This sounds like exactly what I am looking for regarding fleet maintenance! How do I access this particular solution within monday.com?
